Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring After Release and Report
Order - Order Reinstating Post Release Community Supervision (PRCS)

/CAL: APD 3455 PC HRG/EMMOD:HOME DETENTION IS TERMINATED AND CURFEW IS ORDERED FROM MIDNIGHT TO 8AM/CTORD: ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITION OF GPS REMAIN/CONTD: 07-08-22, APD 3455 HEARING, D26 AT 130PM/DOP/

/CAL: TS APD 3455PC/X: DEFENSE REQUEST FOR RELEASE IS GRANTED,/OR/X:AS ACONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORINGBY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND PLACEDON HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: HOME DETENTION APPROVED ACTIVITIES ARE FOR CHILD CARE, ELDER CARE AND WORK/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: 06-10-22 FOR APD PRCS HEARING,  130PM/DOP
/CAL:APD 3455PC MOTION/PD/WIAPRCS/CTORD: PRCS IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/SHER/NB/S26/CONTD:TO SET APD 3455PC (PRCS) IN DEPT, 26/DOP/
